title: Provide customer service
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide customer service demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify customer needs

pcs.text: Identify types of customers and their expectations and needs through consultation and negotiation1.2 Regularly identify and monitor customer needs through formal and informal communication channels to identify required services1.3 Assess current products and services against customer needs to determine the ability of the enterprise to meet them
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify types of customers and their expectations and needs through consultation and negotiation1.2 Regularly identify and monitor customer needs through formal and informal communication channels to identify required services1.3 Assess current products and services against customer needs to determine the ability of the enterprise to meet them?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify types of customers and their expectations and needs through consultation and negotiation1.2 Regularly identify and monitor customer needs through formal and informal communication channels to identify required services1.3 Assess current products and services against customer needs to determine the ability of the enterprise to meet them.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify customer needs

elements.title: Respond to customer needs

pcs.text: Respond to customer requests in a timely and efficient manner2.2 Promote workplace services and products to the customer in a manner that assists the development of a positive and professional relationship2.3 Address customer dissatisfaction promptly according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Respond to customer requests in a timely and efficient manner2.2 Promote workplace services and products to the customer in a manner that assists the development of a positive and professional relationship2.3 Address customer dissatisfaction promptly according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Respond to customer requests in a timely and efficient manner2.2 Promote workplace services and products to the customer in a manner that assists the development of a positive and professional relationship2.3 Address customer dissatisfaction promptly according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Respond to customer needs

elements.title: Evaluate service provided

pcs.text: Evaluate service provided to the customer and take appropriate action to resolve any issues or complaints3.2 Seek feedback from customers on the product or service provided3.3 Document customer feedback according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate service provided to the customer and take appropriate action to resolve any issues or complaints3.2 Seek feedback from customers on the product or service provided3.3 Document customer feedback according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate service provided to the customer and take appropriate action to resolve any issues or complaints3.2 Seek feedback from customers on the product or service provided3.3 Document customer feedback according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Evaluate service provided
